content_rights.rationale: The page expressly permits intact sharing/downloading while forbidding excision/remixing of named third-party imagery; this run uses only captions.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the exact FINAL_CUT_V2 VTT as an official same-group caption asset. Private preservation is provisional; partner imagery and legal/policy review remain unresolved.

content_completeness.rationale: The official page states that a complete transcript is available; the 9.676-second uncovered tail remains an explicit source-coverage fact.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Caption-only private evaluation; no frames, clips, audio extraction, or remix.

third_party_caveats: Tridant Sensing, U.S. Forest Service, Department of War, Pond5, and Universal Production Music material is not excised or remixed.

version_equivalence.evidence: The primary FireSense group co-locates the exact long FINAL_CUT_V2 MP4, same-stem VTT/SRT, and official NASA.gov Video YouTube link.
